untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Weekly S1 pivot level comparison — pivots indicator available but designed for intraday, not weekly aggregation; (2) 'First candle at start of day' — bar position tracking not available in indicator set; (3) 'Sector is weak' — no sector sentiment or relative strength indicator available in allowed set
translation_notes: Attempted to translate core price action (break below support + strong red candle) using available indicators. Mapped 'strong red candle' to negative body with substantial body_pct. Used intraday s1 pivot as proxy for weekly S1, but this is imprecise. Sector weakness condition cannot be expressed without sector performance indicators. Exit condition set to reversal above S1 as reasonable default per AUTHOR_SILENT rule.
